title: Kenyan Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory Kenyan-inspired stir fry made with juicy oysters and a variety of flavors.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spices
ingredients.notes: Blend of cumin, coriander, and chili powder

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced sweet potatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the juicy oysters and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
Sprinkle the Kenyan spices over the top and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the oysters are cooked through.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
Serve with steamed rice or naan bread, if desired.
